calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Jason P. Williamson was present in pro per on his own behalf, and as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Lia Marie Williamson.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jason Phillip Roman.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Lia Marie Roman.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-27-2010 Reset To Jun-10-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Jason Williamson was present in pro per on behalf of himself, and as Guardian ad Litem for the minor.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires futher information from petitioner in order to proceed with today's hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to June 10, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218. No further publication required.
